Avatar Cheat Sheet
It’s hyper critical to have a thorough understanding of what makes
your Avatar tick. Take some time now and answer these important
questions about your Avatar!
1. Who is your Avatar? (gender, age, marital status, kids, interests
and passions, where do they live, likes and dislikes, etc.)
